arts.ttl: Why three Chelsea stars aren't playing vs Brentford as new injury worry revealed
arts.sum: Chelsea selected Adarabioyo on Thursday away to Astana in the Conference League. Instead of the Frenchman, Enzo Maresca turned to Tosin Adarabioyo at the heart of defence.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'voice interest' in 27-year-old goalkeeper as Robert Sanchez verdict delivered
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly identify Borussia Dortmund goalkeeper Gregor Kobel as a potential successor to Robert Sanchez, whom the jury is still out on.

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man City target AMBITIOUS Chelsea transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool are in the market for a new right-back amid concerns that Trent Alexander-Arnold will leave the club on a free transfer next summer, and Gusto has reportedly emerged as a target for Arne Slot’s side. The France defender has impressed since moving to Stamford Bridge last summer and he is currently Enzo Maresca’s first choice right-back amid Reece James’ significant injury struggles.

arts.ttl: Chelsea hatch plan to complete two transfers but it could cost them millions
arts.sum: Chelsea would need to agree to pay a percentage of Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall and Carney Chukwuemeka's wages if they are to leave on loan in January. "We need to understand that Kiernan was the main player at Leicester.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho aims subtle dig at Man Utd as summer Chelsea transfer clause revealed
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho has expressed his contentment with the support he's received since his loan move to Chelsea from Manchester United. Following a stint back at Dortmund, Sancho is now settling into life at Stamford Bridge, with the winger even making a subtle dig at his former manager in a club interview.
